examples: The paper discusses the coal petrography and proximate analysis of the vertical systematical samples of the Honso and Joso coal beds in the Miike coal field.
The Sanxia granite aggregates were determined in their petrography structures and mineral compositions; the quintuplets of quartz of the aggregates were tested.
Petrography and mineral chemistry of 100 meteorites collected from the Grove Mountains, Antarctica, were studied and their chemical-petrographic types were assigned.
